_note: AI-translated UI strings, refined for natural phrasing. Report wording issues at velanto-frontend#44.

settings.title: ترجیحات
settings.languageHint: مینو اور بٹنوں کی زبان تبدیل کرتا ہے۔ پیک کا مواد اسی زبان میں رہتا ہے جس میں اس کے تخلیق کار نے اسے لکھا تھا۔

streamerMode.settingsDescription: Hides all viewer avatars, names, and comments so you can screen-share without exposing anyone. Reveal any item individually when you need to.

auth.acceptRules: I have read and accept the <link>Community Rules</link>.

rules.metaDescription: The community rules for creating and playing packs on Velanto — read them before you register.
rules.heading: Community Rules
rules.intro: These rules keep Velanto safe and fair for everyone. By creating an account you agree to follow them.
